Class Enemy

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.characters.Enemy
All Implemented Interfaces:
Character
public final class Enemy extends Object implements Character
Represents an Enemy in the game. It loads enemy stats from a JSON file and manages AI behavior (next action).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Enemy(EnemyType type)
    Creates a level 1 enemy of the specified type.
    Enemy(EnemyType type, int level)
    Creates an enemy with a specific type and level.

  • Constructor Details

    • Enemy

      public Enemy(EnemyType type, int level)
      Creates an enemy with a specific type and level.
      Parameters:
      type - the type of enemy.
      level - the level of the enemy (must be >= 1).

    • Enemy

      public Enemy(EnemyType type)
      Creates a level 1 enemy of the specified type.
      Parameters:
      type - the type of enemy.

      public void addProtection(int amount)
      Description copied from interface: Character
      Adds protection (shield) to the character.

      Parameters:

      public void resetProtection()
      Resets the enemy protection to 0.

    • protection

      public int protection()
      Description copied from interface: Character
      Returns the current protection (armor) value. Protection absorbs damage before health is reduced.
      Specified by:
      protection in interface Character
      Returns:
      the protection value.

    • setProtection

      public void setProtection(int protection)
      Description copied from interface: Character
      Sets the protection value.

      setProtection in interface Character
      Parameters:
      protection - the new protection value.

      public boolean isBoss()
      Checks if this enemy is a boss.
      Returns:
      true if boss.

      public boolean isMinion()
      Checks if this enemy is a minion serving a specific boss.
      Returns:
      true if it is a minion.

    • canSummon

      public boolean canSummon()
      Returns true if this enemy is a summoner (like a Boss with minions).
      Returns:
      true if can summon.

    • random

      public static Enemy random(int heroLevel, boolean boss)
      Creates a random enemy based on hero level.
      Parameters:
      heroLevel - the level of the hero.
      boss - true if we want to generate a boss.
      Returns:
      a new random Enemy.

    • random

      public static Enemy random(int heroLevel)
      Creates a random normal enemy based on hero level.
      Parameters:
      heroLevel - the level of the hero.
      Returns:
      a new random Enemy.

    • nextAction

      public EventEnemy nextAction()
      Gets the next action the enemy has planned to do.
      Returns:
      the EventEnemy (Attack, Protection, Curse).

    • updateNextAction

      public void updateNextAction()
      Calculates a new random action for the enemy for the next turn. Some enemies (like FrogWizard) have special actions like Curse.

    • attack

      public void attack(Hero hero)
      Attacks a hero using the enemy's base damage.
      Parameters:
      hero - the hero to attack.

    • attack

      public void attack(Hero hero, int damage)
      Attacks a hero with specific damage amount.
      Parameters:
      hero - the hero to attack.
      damage - the amount of damage.

    • setLastDamageTaken

      public void setLastDamageTaken(int amount)
      Sets the value of the last damage taken (for display purposes).
      Parameters:
      amount - the damage amount.

    • takeDamage

      public void takeDamage(int amount)
      Description copied from interface: Character
      Makes the character take damage. The logic is: 1. Damage is applied to protection first. 2. Remaining damage is applied to health (PV). * @param damage the amount of damage to take.
      Specified by:
      takeDamage in interface Character

    • getLastDamageTaken

      public int getLastDamageTaken()
